examples: Objective In order to observe effect of short-wave ultraviolet ray therapy in decubital ulcer of skin.
Objective To prevent the occurrence of decubital ulcer and intensify its nursing before hospitalization for the purpose of improving the nursing quality.
Objective to investigate the operating approaches and therapeutic effect by shifting with superior gluteal perforator island skin flaps (SGPISF) in repairing sacroiliac decubital necrosis.
